name: 3-Wick 28oz Glass Wildflowers Candle Blue - Opalhouse™
description:
This 28-oz Glass Candle in Wildflowers Blue by Opalhouse™ is just what you need on a nice, quiet evening. Molded into a glass body, this candle burns for up to 60 hours, acting as the perfect stress buster. Easy to display on a mantel or a side table, this glass jar scented candle is a must-have you’ll want to keep handy.

Create spaces as bold as your spirit.
